name: Reflex Happy Hour Dog Treat Salmon & Whey Powder 60g
description: Delight your dog with the irresistible crunch and nourishment of Reflex Happy Hours Dog Treats! Made with premium ingredients, these crunchy morsels combine delicious flavour with essential nutrients that support your dog’s health from the inside out. Each treat is crafted to deliver the perfect balance of taste, texture, and nutrition ideal for training, rewarding good behavior, or simply showing love. Formulated with processed salmon protein and whey powder , these treats promote a shiny coat, healthy skin, and strong muscles. Their crunchy texture naturally helps clean teeth and reduce plaque buildup, while added vitamins and minerals support overall vitality and immunity. Key Benefits Supports Skin & Coat Health – Enriched with salmon protein, salmon oil, and omega fatty acids to promote a shiny coat and healthy skin. Crunchy for Dental Care – Helps clean teeth and support gum health with every bite. High Nutrient Content – Packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants for complete daily nourishment. No Artificial Additives – Free from preservatives, fillers, and artificial colours for a wholesome treat. Perfect for Training or Rewards – Delicious and nutritious, ideal for everyday bonding moments. Ingredients Processed Salmon Protein (20%), Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Chicken Fat, Wheat Bran, Hydrolyzed Salmon Protein, Salmon Oil, Whey Powder, Fish Flavor, Powdered Cellulose, Vitamins and Minerals, Brewer's Yeast, Salt, Flaxseed, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharide (MOS), Aloe Vera, Preservatives and Antioxidants (E320 & E321). Guaranteed Analysis Nutrient Value Crude Protein 24% Fat Content 16% Crude Cellulose 3% Raw Ash 8% Humidity (Max.) 8%   Nutritional Additives Vitamins: A (3a672a), D₃ (3a671), E (3a700), C (3a300), B₁ (3a821), B₂ (3a825i), B₃ (Niacin-3a315), B₆ (3a831), B₁₂ (3A), B₇ (Biotin-3a880), B₉ (Folic Acid-3a316), K₃ (3a710), Choline (3a890), Calcium Pantothenate (3a841). Minerals: Iron (3b103), Iodine (3b202), Copper (3b405), Manganese (3b502), Zinc (3b603), Selenium (3b802). Feeding Recommendations Suitable for adult dogs of all breeds. Can be fed as a snack or training reward between meals. Adjust serving size based on your dog’s age, weight, and activity level. Always provide fresh drinking water. Store in a cool, dry place and reseal after opening. Colour and size may vary naturally depending on ingredients. Not suitable for human consumption. Why Choose Reflex Happy Hours Treats? Expertly crafted with premium ingredients Promotes healthy skin, coat, and teeth Balanced nutrition in every crunchy bite Ideal for daily rewards and positive reinforcement Free from artificial preservatives and fillers Make every moment a celebration with Reflex Happy Hours Dog Treats — where health meets happiness in every bite!
